history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! We have our World Famous Fries® available in three sizes. Would you like to order fries?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hello, I'm looking for a hearty meal without sugar. What do you recommend today?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! We have a few hearty options today: Butter Chicken Grilled Burger, Chicken Maharaja Mac®, and McEgg®. Would you like to try one of these? If you need a sugar-free option, please let me know.

history.speaker: client
history.text: I can't have sugar, so I'll take the Butter Chicken Grilled Burger. Please make it sugar-free.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, I'll prepare your Butter Chicken Grilled Burger. Since we don't have a sugar-free option for this item, it will be served standard. Would you like to add any other items, like fries or a drink?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, please add large fries and water. Thank you.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, I'll add Our World Famous Fries® and water. Your order is: 1 Butter Chicken Grilled Burger, 1 Our World Famous Fries®, and 1 water. Please confirm.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: 1 Butter Chicken Grilled Burger, 1 large World Famous Fries®, and 1 water. Thank you! Have a great day.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thank you. Have a great day.

query_texts: popular menu items burger chicken fries

documents: Our World Famous Fries®. The crisp, craveable, fan favourite: our World Famous Fries®. These epic fries are crispy and golden on the outside and fluffy on the inside.. Potato and salt. The legend among legends.

Our World Famous Fries®. The crisp, craveable, fan favourite: our World Famous Fries®. These epic fries are crispy and golden on the outside and fluffy on the inside.. Potato and salt. The legend among legends.

rag_trace.context_preview:
- Our World Famous Fries® (~224.59 kcal, allergens: none listed)
- Our World Famous Fries® (~449.17 kcal, allergens: none listed)
- Our World Famous Fries® (~317.92 kcal, allergens: none listed)

documents: Butter Chicken Grilled Burger. Premium grilled chicken patty topped with makhani sauce and shredded onions placed between freshly toasted sesame seeded buns.. Premium grilled chicken patty, Shredded onion, Sesame seeded buns. Dil se makhani burger.

Chicken Maharaja Mac®. A double-decker toasted Maharaja bun sandwiched with one layer of flame-grilled chicken patty; crunchy iceberg lettuce; shredded onion; and a slice of cheese. Topped with another layer of flame-grilled
                                chicken patty; tomato slices; and crunchy iceberg lettuce infused with harberno sauce.. Maharaja bun crown, Haberno sauce, Shredded lettuce, Shredded onion, Jalapenos, Flame-grilled chicken patty, Sliced cheese, Maharaja bun heel. A royal treat.

McEgg®. Made with the freshest, warm, off-the-farm egg; steamed to perfection in our specialised steamer; and made tasty with a sprinkling of magic masala. Sandwiched between freshly toasted buns, topped off with
                                creamy mayo and some crunchy onion.. Regular bun crown, Mayonnaise, Crisp onion, Egg, Curry spices, Regular bun heel. Because eggs are great any time of the day.

documents: Butter Chicken Grilled Burger. Premium grilled chicken patty topped with makhani sauce and shredded onions placed between freshly toasted sesame seeded buns.. Premium grilled chicken patty, Shredded onion, Sesame seeded buns. Dil se makhani burger.

McSpicy Chicken®. Zesty and redolent whole muscle leg meat patty: Fried to perfect golden tan; quenched with creamy veg mayo and garden-fresh shredded iceberg lettuce. The sandwich is served in fresh, sesame-studded quarter
                                pounder bun.. Quarter pounder bun crown, Veg sauce, Shredded lettuce, McSpicy chicken patty, Quarter pounder bun heel. Hot. In more ways than one.

Chicken Maharaja Mac®. A double-decker toasted Maharaja bun sandwiched with one layer of flame-grilled chicken patty; crunchy iceberg lettuce; shredded onion; and a slice of cheese. Topped with another layer of flame-grilled
                                chicken patty; tomato slices; and crunchy iceberg lettuce infused with harberno sauce.. Maharaja bun crown, Haberno sauce, Shredded lettuce, Shredded onion, Jalapenos, Flame-grilled chicken patty, Sliced cheese, Maharaja bun heel. A royal treat.

documents: Black Coffee®. Perfectly brewed for any time of the day.

Veg Maharaja Mac®. A double-decker toasted Maharaja bun sandwiched with one layer of corn & cheese patty; crunchy iceberg lettuce; shredded onion; and a slice of cheese. Topped with another layer of corn & cheese patty;
